summary: Tested Category-Specific Size Charts (Virtual Try-On) and Face Attendance System. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified - Virtual Try-On category selector works correctly (Tops=S/M/L format, Bottoms=28/30/32 format). Face Attendance page fully functional with AI model selection, register face dialog, camera controls.

ui_bugs.issue:
React hydration warning:
cannot be descendant of

in Badge component

features_tested.feature: Virtual Try-On - Category selector dropdown appears after entering measurements
features_tested.details: Category selector shows 5 options: Tops, Bottoms, Dresses, Outerwear, Ethnic Wear

features_tested.feature: Virtual Try-On - Switching category from 'Tops' to 'Bottoms' changes available sizes
Virtual Try-On - Recommended size format matches selected category
features_tested.details: Tops recommends 'M', Bottoms recommends '32' based on measurements

features_tested.feature: Face Attendance - Page loads correctly with AI model badge
features_tested.details: Page shows 'Model: VGG-Face' badge, all UI elements present

features_tested.feature: Face Attendance - Start Camera and Upload Photo buttons work
Face Attendance - Register Face dialog opens correctly
features_tested.details: Dialog shows employee selector, instructions, camera preview, Start Camera and Upload Photo buttons

features_tested.feature: Face Attendance - Today's Attendance section visible

features_tested.details: Returns registered faces list with count. Shows 1 registered face (ahmad firdous)
Returns available AI models (ArcFace 99.5%, Facenet512 99.2%, Facenet 98.5%, VGG-Face 97.5%), current_model, deepface_available

features_tested.feature: Face Attendance - AI Model selection dialog
features_tested.details: Shows 4 models with accuracy and speed info, ArcFace marked as 'Recommended', VGG-Face as 'Current'
